cases.name: EVM publication readiness stays explicit and fail closed
cases.notes: Chio now models publisher authorization, delegate requirement, and next checkpoint sequence before publication.

cases.name: Primary proof verification ties receipts back to the official root registry
cases.notes: Receipt inclusion, checkpoint projection, and on-chain proof calls all share one canonical proof family.

cases.name: OpenTimestamps linkage must match the Chio super-root digest and a Bitcoin attestation
cases.notes: Chio rejects pending-only or mismatched OTS payloads instead of treating opaque base64 as anchored proof.

cases.name: Pending-only OTS payloads fail closed
cases.notes: The secondary lane is not considered anchored until a Bitcoin attestation exists.

cases.name: Solana memo records must exactly match canonical checkpoint data
cases.notes: Memo program id, memo payload, checkpoint sequence, and anchored root all fail closed on mismatch.

cases.name: Unsupported or inconsistent multi-lane bundles are rejected
cases.notes: Bundle declarations cannot silently widen proof trust beyond the imported evidence that actually exists.

cases.name: Canonical evidence bundles reject uncheckpointed or incomplete proof inputs
cases.notes: Chio now projects anchor proofs only from canonical evidence bundles that contain the receipt, one checkpoint, and one inclusion proof; stale or uncheckpointed exports fail closed.
